raw.question: Covered #892 transient blip with present worker
raw.chosen: Covered #892 transient blip with present worker
raw.reasoning: The new regression keeps the worker in the registry, kills its process to make every deliver write fail, loops retry_pending_delivery to MAX_DELIVERY_RETRIES, then asserts the typed message_delivery_failed frame arrives on sdk_out_tx.

events.content: Focused #892 regression is green; production event emission now uses typed BrokerEvent variants and retry deferral is scoped to worker queue/verification windows.

retrospective.summary: Fixed #892 transient delivery blip coverage and tightened delivery event/state handling from the reliability review
